headline: Take the Zacks Approach to Beat the Markets: LiveOne, Micron, Clorox in Focus
summary: LVO, MU and CLX highlight how Zacks strategies and portfolio picks are delivering strong gains despite recent market volatility.

headline: Monolithic Power (MPWR) Gained as Its Blackwell Platform Fared Stronger
summary: Brown Advisory, an investment management company, released its “Brown Advisory Mid-Cap Growth Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy lagged the Russell Midcap® Growth Index in the fourth quarter due to stock selection. While the performance was in line with the expectations for the full year. The […]
